utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore, only 2 items are fully specified: destination and travel_dates, plus additional_services is fully specified (has service and cost). That makes 3 fully specified out of 7.
